# Legacy Runtime Evidence Map Plan

This planning note mirrors Phase 6.2 documentation. It does not create a GitHub workflow, action, deployment, provider adapter, or runtime execution path.

## Plan

- Preserve legacy route segregation.
- Maintain non-certified status for all mapped routes.
- Use route-specific evidence maps as reviewer context only.
- Block certification until replay, audit, trace, consent, DNC, provider, orchestration, fail-closed, escalation, and reviewer approval evidence exists.
- Defer deterministic sandbox evidence registry concepts to Phase 6.3 after evidence mapping approval.

## Non-Execution Boundary

No workflow file is created by this planning note. No runtime communication is enabled.
